prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UMLDSHS-BLCK-PZ-AMZ Product Type: STETHOSCOPE Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Medical Lightweight Diagnostic Non Chill Single Head Stethoscope 30in Universal Description: Add comfort and durability to your exam routine with the Universal Medical Single Head Stethoscope.

This lightweight stethoscope offers high acoustic sensitivity for exceptional listening ability as well as a non-chill head for patient comfort. Durable design features an anodized aluminum chest piece, and white plastic ear tips. Adjustable binurals offers complete versatility.

Must have for medical professionals and for at-home use, to keep track of vital signs. Search Terms: doctor health nurse wellness care Features: - Length of Tube: 24" - Overall Length: 30" - Color: Black - Durable & Reliable - Single Head === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 30-in Universal Black Single Head Stethoscope

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lightweight Diagnostic Design, Non-Chill Head, High Acoustic Sensitivity, Adjustable Binurals, Durable Aluminum Chest Piece

openai.title_differentiation: Lightweight, High Acoustic Sensitivity, Non-Chill Chest Piece, Anodized Aluminum, Adjustable Binaurals
